title: Stunspot’s Guide to Macroeconomics
description: A model-facing macroeconomics canon for monetary systems, liquidity regimes, financial instability, and institutional strategy. The release contains 13 source reports, 4 compiled AI/RAG upload packs, and 1 omnibus bundle covering money, credit, collateral, liquidity, central banking, fiscal systems, banking intermediation, asset regimes, global currency hierarchy, innovation finance, narrative liquidity, crisis mechanics, diagnostics, and institutional macro strategy.
